title: apocynum venetum subsp. russanovii
intro: Apocynum venetum subsp. russanovii, also known as the Russian dogbane, is a subspecies of plant that belongs to the Apocynaceae family. It has been traditionally used in Eastern medicine, particularly in China and Russia, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, diuretic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Apocynum venetum subsp. russanovii include relieving symptoms of hypertension, heart palpitations, and edema, as well as treating conditions such as bronchitis and asthma. Apocynum venetum subsp. russanovii is often used in herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
